meaning: n.贝尔格莱德(南斯拉夫首都)
examples: He had been in Belgrade for about 18 months.
In Belgrade, Serbia’s opposition scents his blood.
For those of you who might be considering visiting Belgrade, don't.
He came to Belgrade to watch soccer matches and to dine out at a well-known restaurant.
Police held him at Belgrade airport for an hour, the pro-government daily newspaper Pobjeda has reported.
